PostToolUse.command: FILE="${file}"; EXT="${FILE##*.}"; if [ "$EXT" = "py" ]; then cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif [ "$EXT" = "ts" ] || [ "$EXT" = "tsx" ]; then cd frontend && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

PreToolUse.command: if grep -qn 'api_key\s*=\|secret_key\s*=\|password\s*=' "${file}" 2>/dev/null; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Possible secret detected in file. Use environment variables.' && exit 1; fi; true

Stop.command: echo '--- Running quick validation ---' && cd backend && uv run pytest -x --tb=line -q 2>&1 | tail -5 && cd ../frontend && pnpm lint --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5; true
